title: Finite Householder Reflection Checks

solver_reuse.target: finite Householder bad reflection entry QF_LRA/Farkas regression seed
solver_reuse.pressure: Exact Householder replay computes the top-left reflection entry as -3/5 while a malformed row claims -4/5, isolating a compact equality conflict for the Farkas route.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional orthogonal-factorization rows only when they add distinct reflector, zeroing, product, least-squares, residual, or numerical-honesty pressure; keep Householder/QR algorithm correctness, pivoting, conditioning, and floating-point stability in theorem or numerical-honesty lanes.

graduation_criteria: Encode the fixed rational reflector vector, denominator, Householder matrix, source vector, reflected vector, inverse reconstruction, determinant, and orthogonality identity as deterministic exact-rational replay obligations.
Route the false reflection-entry row through a source-linked QF_LRA artifact and checked Farkas evidence after exact replay computes H[0,0] = -3/5.
Expose the pack through matrix computation, QR/factorization, orthogonal-transform, and exact-vs-floating learner and consumer query surfaces.
Keep general Householder/QR algorithm correctness, pivoting, conditioning, and floating-point stability marked Lean or numerical-honesty horizon.
